disambiguated.context: Two close friends were texting back and forth about their relationships. One was lesbian and had been in a relationship for just under four years; the other was pansexual and had been in a relationship for just over four years. The pansexual one was having second thoughts and feeling a bit scared of taking the relationship any further or really investing in it. The lesbian one felt the opposite, though, and was pretty much ready to get married already.
